printed.name: Teaser Prep
printed.setup: Lying supine over barrel, arms straight, reaching overhead, hands holding handles, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed, legs aligned with trunk
printed.spring_setting: Socket: C, Lever Orientation: 0, Lever Length: 1, Lever Direction: 7, Connector: C, Spring: Y/S

movement.exhale: Lift arms, head and chest up and forward, arms parallel to floor, simultaneously lift legs perpendicular to floor (as close as possible)

cues: Continue reaching arms overhead to maximum range of shoulders
